Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x8800 "AHDIDDUMS-8800" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Ah Diddums (J1).prg"
Metadata.Notes: The loading screen was converted from the Spectrum version by Alfonso Fernandez Borro (https://zxart.ee/eng/authors/letter20332/-af-).
